function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS before entering entity/project lanes, used canonical entity alias for project linkage, read all matching project records.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/lukas.md` defines alias `lukas`. Searching project records found two canonical README files containing structured link `entity.lukas`, and both README files list status `active`. Therefore active project count involving Lukas is 2.
